description: Verso: Dowry list of a prospective Karaite bride (no groom is listed). Dated 3 Elul 5530 AM (1770 CE). The main heading states that the first part of the dowry list of 'Aziza bt. Shelomo aka Ṣaʿīr is comprised of "that which the deceased (father) purchased before his death" (אול דאלך משתרי אלמרחום קבל ופאתה). Further down the list, another subheading specifies dowry items that were purchased after the time of Shelomo aka Ṣaʿīr's death, probably by 'Aziza herself and/or unnamed family members (ואיצ'ה בעד ופאת אלמרחום). The two currency types listed throughout the item valuations are mashṭ and fiḍḍa. The former could be Austrian thalers or Spanish reales and the latter represents para/medin. The recto contains an unrelated letter draft in Hebrew. MCD.
description_he: רשימה או טבלה ביהודית-ערבית. מוחזק בהספרייה הלאומית רוסיה.
